title: Final scene in 10
wikitext:
[]: Final scene in 1.0             Quote Post by qu4d » Fri Nov 14, 2008 5:12 pm In the end of Eva 1.01 there is this new scene with Kaworu... and this is bugging me. German dub: Kaworu: Es wird also wieder der Dritte sein. Du änderst dich nie, oder? Ich freue mich schon auf unsere Begegnung, Shinji Ikari.

[]:             Quote Post by Jinroh » Fri Nov 14, 2008 5:43 pm If he was talking to a god, it would be the FAR, so... I don't even know if he knows about them or not. I think he's clearly talking to himself about Shinji, and about how similar he is to his previous self, if the whole story is indeed a loop.

[]:             Quote Post by Lucretius » Fri Nov 14, 2008 6:14 pm I thinki he's talking about Shinji. Sequel theory forever! ( dodges bullet )

[]:             Quote Post by Rodeo » Fri Nov 14, 2008 9:00 pm No way. He's probably talking to, and about, the thing right in front of him.

[]:             Quote Post by Axell » Fri Nov 14, 2008 9:12 pm hes talking to chairman keel through his monolith. He comes on screen 3 seconds after that shot

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Nov 14, 2008 9:59 pm Axell wrote: hes talking to chairman keel through his monolith. He comes on screen 3 seconds after that shot

[]:             Quote Post by RockManBalls » Fri Nov 14, 2008 11:41 pm There is a 90% chance that he's talking about Shinji being the third one based on the context. I hold a 10% chance in my mind that he's referring to the white giant in front of him based on the fact that he uses the phrase "三番目," which is interchangeable with the numbering of the Angels (I think...). It just sounds slightly awkward and mechanical in the Japanese that he cares/knows who was the first, second, or third child(ren) whatever, or why it's worth saying it like that. I mean, how many times have you referred to a friend of yours as "the third one?" I dunno, I'm rambling.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Nov 15, 2008 12:11 am Short for "Sanbanme no tekininsha"　(三番目の適任者）, maybe? They used this kind of numbering scheme in the original as the Japanese equivalent of the "(ordinal) Children" stuff. I've wondered if they're actually playing around with us by having Kaworu deliver the line the moment he turns to the giant. I.e., in the textual context he's talking about Shinji, but they're dropping a hint at the same time that the giant is the mysterious Third Angel. It seems like the sort of thing Anno & Friends would do.

[]:             Quote Post by Iron Rooster » Sat Nov 15, 2008 12:17 am I just noticed the big bulge in the middle of the white things chest.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Nov 15, 2008 12:39 am Indeed, presumably a core. The giant is actually wearing a huge gimp suit (I guess Seele are trying to get it into S&M), not that you can see the seams in the material clearly on the DVD or anything. But that's what the production drawings are for. ...huh huh huh, you said "bulge".

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat Nov 15, 2008 1:15 pm Reichu wrote: I.e., in the textual context he's talking about Shinji, but they're dropping a hint at the same time that the giant is the mysterious Third Angel. It seems like the sort of thing Anno & Friends would do.

[]:             Quote Post by Lucretius » Sat Nov 15, 2008 4:30 pm I think the "du" in the German translation is interesting. Keel Lorenz would probably be a "Sie", no?

[]:             Quote Post by Jinroh » Sat Nov 15, 2008 5:25 pm Yeah but the german translators don't know more than we do. And I still don't know why it's debatable, he's just talking to himself about Shinji. I mean, come on. No big deal.

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Sat Nov 15, 2008 5:46 pm agree w/ SSD & Reichu... time loop theory is lame. Also, I only just now realized that the moon giant has ears! I don't know why that amuses me, but it does... visions of eva-sized wet willies spring to mind.

[]:             Quote Post by V » Sat Nov 15, 2008 8:14 pm NemZ wrote: agree w/ SSD & Reichu... time loop theory is lame.

[]:             Quote Post by Lucretius » Sat Nov 15, 2008 8:18 pm I'm with V.

[]:             Quote Post by V » Sat Nov 15, 2008 9:14 pm Lucretius wrote: I'm with V.

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Sat Nov 15, 2008 10:37 pm V wrote: the first sensible phrase I've heard all day: say it loud, it's like a battle-cry. Say it soft, it's like a prayer.

[]:             Quote Post by Bluespade » Sun Nov 16, 2008 1:37 am I'm with ya too V.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Nov 16, 2008 3:22 am This thread isn't a Sequel Theory Fan Listing, folks. UrsusArctos wrote: Nothing too surprising about the ears. Lilith has "ears" of a sort in both instances.
